title: Empyrion - Galactic Survival

gpu: X.Org AMD Radeon (TM) R9 Fury Series (FIJI, DRM 3.26.0, 4.18.9-arch1-1-ARCH, LLVM 6.0.1)
notes: Flat out does not even start, no window appears.
title: Empyrion - Galactic Survival

notes: The game crashes on launch. I assume this is due to "Easy Anti Cheat". The game WILL launch if you rename the "EmpyrionLauncher.exe" and Replace it with the game's executable "Empyrion.exe" (Requires copying game data folder to mimic the launcher name). The textures are pure white, IF they load the framerate is below 10.
title: Empyrion - Galactic Survival

notes:
okay, i've tried almost anything i can think of for this, i've tried the file swap... custom flags.
loaded my data from windows to fedora manually.
renamed EAC stuff to attempt to force loading.
the Closest i've gotten, is from using the steam console to view the "log" as it starts, nothing fancy, just hitting play and jumping to console view.
I got an X window error...
so i tried using unity's commandline width and height options, this removed the X error at least.
i'm thinking bypass the launcher, force EAC off, and configure the video manually may be the trick. way beyond my windows based experience...
title: Empyrion - Galactic Survival

notes: Game won't start. No pop up or error message.
